reportedIssues: Game carousels/grids in both the "BetRivers Exclusive Games" and "Top Played New Games" sections are cut off on the right side, leaving the third column partially visible and unreadable.
The top navigation tab on the right is truncated, showing only "Hot Ga" instead of the full label.

expected.reasoning: Neither reported issue mentions Jackpots category or any category highlighting problem; both issues describe different UI elements (game carousels and navigation tabs).
